concerns.detail: Deleted text contains personally identifying information about a specific student (the intern) including first-person account details and private email communications ('jitendra 本人给我发的邮件', 'cc过我改名字')
concerns.excerpt: intern本人来辟谣了...jitendra 本人给我发的邮件

concerns.detail: Removal of the intern's first-hand defense testimony regarding recommendation letter practices, while retaining skeptical/critical responses, appears to suppress a substantive legitimate observation about the advisor
concerns.excerpt: intern本人来辟谣了, 这个纯瞎扯, 我确认每封信都是老板申过的

concerns.detail: Text contains personal attack using clown emoji ('小丑🤡一个') to insult an individual rather than criticizing concrete advising practices
